name: Red Pepper Puree
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the olive oil in a large saucepan over high heat.
2. Add the onions and garlic to the pan; sauté for 10 minutes until they are soft.
3. Add the red bell peppers, chicken stock, and chili sauce to the pan.
4. Bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce the heat and let it simmer, covered, until the vegetables are very tender.
5. Allow the mixture to cool before pureeing in a food processor or blender.
6. This recipe makes about 3 1/2 cups. It can be stored for short periods when refrigerated.
7. You may substitute a reduced amount of hot pepper sauce for the Szechuan chili sauce. Serve with stir-fried or steamed chicken, fish.
